title: discocalyx suluensis
intro: Discocalyx suluensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in the tropical forests of the Philippines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Discocalyx suluensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an anti-diarrheal agent. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas or infusions, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
